title: Attach request fields to log events
scenario: Useful logs carry fields such as request_id and attempt count so operators can filter and correlate events.
instructions: Add LogFields and include fields on LogEvent.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps log-event-fields explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
